Global cues strong (US +1.5-2%). Time to lock in gains via SL trails on winners — many positions are now well in-the-money and need breakeven/profit-locked SLs.",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",

    },

      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

  "watchlist_notes": "Strong setups today: LUPIN (Q4 today binary risk — pass on new entry per binary discipline), AUROPHARMA (Q4 May 30, breakout +7.6% but no near-term catalyst, watch for pullback), HINDPETRO (BEARISH research — Goldman downgrade, LPG losses — pass), DABUR (results today binary — pass), BAJAJ-AUTO/M&M/POLYCAB (deferred — book is already 11 positions large; selectivity matters). HFCL pending order from earlier still OPEN — leaving alone, will let it fill or expire on its own.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book has 11 CNC positions, well-diversified across HFC, gold, ports, defense (HAL+GRSE = defense cluster, monitor), chemicals, capital goods (TITAGARH+GRSE rail/defense overlap), financials (ABCAPITAL+CAMS+PNBHOUSING — financials cluster, three names), FMCG, IT. Financial cluster is at the edge — no more financials adds today. Cash deployment likely high after fills; once positions reflect actual cash usage will reassess. Net: today is a HOLD/let-winners-run day, not an add day. SLs already trail at or near breakeven on most names — risk is well-controlled. No new entries despite many setups due to (a) cluster discipline (financials, defense already concentrated), (b) several Q4 binary risks within 3 sessions (LUPIN, DABUR today; HINDPETRO May 13; HAL May 14)."
